data.title: Warren Buffett's Unconventional Career Advice: 'Don't Save Your Passion For Later, It's Like Saving Up Sex For Your Old Age'
data.description: In a speech at the University of Georgia, billionaire Warren Buffett once gave a piece of unconventional career advice. He compared the strategy of building a perfect resume to "saving up sex for your old age."

data.title: Elon Musk's Government Overhaul Faces Revolt—Even From Trump's Own Officials
Mark Cuban Warns Elon Musk Is Making Trump's Job '1,000 Times Harder'
data.description: Elon Musk, who is leading the charge at the Department of Government Efficiency, has received a warning from Mark Cuban.

data.title: Crypto Analyst Predicts 195% Bitcoin Rally, Says Bull Market Not Over Yet
data.description:
The bull market for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is far from over, according to crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe. 



What Happened: Despite the recent correction of the cryptocurrency to the $80,000 range, van de Poppe foresees a significant rally for Bitcoin.

data.title: Charlie Munger Shared Advice For The Young, But It Applies To All: 'If You've Got Anything You Really Want to Do, Don't Wait Until You're 93'
